document.title: 1320 S2 Soul Mirror Content Asset Database v2 EN
document.module: S2 Soul Mirror / 灵魂镜像
document.purpose: Standalone S2 Soul Mirror content asset database for NOVA lookup and Awareness Layer report rendering.

positioning.module_function: S2 Soul Mirror reflects relational mirror patterns, attraction dynamics, recurring interpersonal lessons, emotional triggers, and the way relationships may reveal unconscious material.
positioning.important_boundary: S2 is not relationship destiny, compatibility verdict, soulmate proof, breakup advice, reconciliation advice, or a command about another person. It is a symbolic mirror for observing relational patterns.

calculation_dependency.range: S2-01 to S2-50 in legacy source; valid Gregorian birth dates normally produce S2-02 to S2-43.

nova_rendering_rule.lookup_behavior: NOVA calculates S2, looks up the matching S2-XX entry, and renders the approved fields.
allowed_generation: Short bridge sentence from S1 or positioning disclaimer into the S2 section.
Brief integration summary using retrieved content only.
must_not_generate: Do not create a new S2 relationship archetype from scratch.
Do not tell users to stay, leave, divorce, reconcile, pursue, block, or confront someone as a command.
Do not present S2 as compatibility proof, soulmate confirmation, karmic destiny, or relationship prediction.
Do not judge another person as good, bad, toxic, destined, or spiritually assigned based on S2.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方触发你最深层的安全感议题。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 害怕被抛弃与害怕被亲近来回摆动。
content.lesson_zh: 建立来自自身的安全，而不是来自关系。
content.healing_path_zh: 内在小孩的修复与边界练习。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你不是缺乏安全感，你是在找回力量。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 安全感镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 内在小孩的修复与边界练习。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 双方互相试图掌控情绪、节奏或方向。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 愤怒与委屈循环。
content.lesson_zh: 放下控制，练习信任。
content.healing_path_zh: 专注当下，而不是预设未来。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 控制是恐惧的外衣，信任才是力量。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 控制镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 专注当下，而不是预设未来。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方让你看见自我否定或自我怀疑。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 期待别人证明你的价值。
content.lesson_zh: 价值是存在本身，而不是被认可。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你的价值从未被减少，只是被遮住。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 自我价值镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 断开比较、羞耻、讨好。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 容易产生情感依附或能量融合。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 分离焦虑与黏着关系互相切换。
content.lesson_zh: 练习独立而不分离。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 爱不是失去自己。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 依赖镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 回到自己的力量中心。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 双方将自己害怕的部分投射到对方身上。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 误会、指责、情绪化反应。
content.lesson_zh: 看见被投射的真相。
content.healing_path_zh: 觉察第一反应背后的恐惧。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你看到的不是对方，是你未看见的自己。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 投射镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 觉察第一反应背后的恐惧。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 不断需要对方证明爱或肯定。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 累积不满与焦虑。
content.lesson_zh: 关闭“外求验证”模式。
content.healing_path_zh: 将注意力转向自身价值感。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你无需被证明，你本身就是答案。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 求证镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 将注意力转向自身价值感。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror

content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方放大你的失败感或目标焦虑。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 努力 → 失望 → 更努力 → 再失败。
content.lesson_zh: 觉察“追求完美”的幻象。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 不完美，是灵魂继续成长的入口。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 挫败镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 宽恕自身的不完美。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 在关系中互相比较高低。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 输赢、优越、嫉妒循环。
content.lesson_zh: 释放比较意识。
content.healing_path_zh: 练习共同成长而非对抗。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你们不是对手，而是镜子。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 竞争镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 练习共同成长而非对抗。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方触发深层羞耻、尴尬、脆弱。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 隐藏自我 → 被误解 → 更隐藏。
content.lesson_zh: 看见羞耻背后对爱的渴望。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 羞耻是灵魂要你回家的信号。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 羞耻镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 允许脆弱被看见。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror

content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方的距离触发你的不安。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 越焦虑越被疏离。
content.lesson_zh: 放下对“回应速度”的期待。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 真正的亲密来自内心，而不是距离。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 冷漠镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 学习稳定自身能量。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror

content.karmic_loop_zh: 一方付出过多，另一方退缩。
content.lesson_zh: 觉察“拯救”或“被拯救”的需求。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你不是任何人的救世主。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 责任镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 回到平等的能量交换。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 避免冲突、逃避沟通、情绪冷冻。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 回避 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再回避。
content.lesson_zh: 直面关系的真实。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 逃避不是不在意，而是不敢面对真相。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 逃避镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 用觉知沟通代替沉默。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.lesson_zh: 看见评判背后的恐惧与不安。

content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 用理解代替攻击。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 认可镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 回到自我存在的力量。

content.healing_path_zh: 不再依赖“强烈感”来确认爱。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 稳定比激情更接近灵魂。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 感情强度镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 不再依赖“强烈感”来确认爱。

content.name: Soul Mirror

content.lesson_zh: 建立清晰界限。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 界限不是拒绝，是尊重。

content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror

content.karmic_loop_zh: 不够好 → 冲刺 → 疲惫 → 否定。
content.lesson_zh: 放下“必须很强”的压力。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 灵魂不靠成就定义。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 成就镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 感谢现阶段的自己。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 害怕表达自己，或表达被误解。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 压抑 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再压抑。
content.lesson_zh: 允许真实流动。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你的声音本来就重要。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 自我表达镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 说出真实，但不攻击。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 关系中的依恋风格被放大。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 不安依恋与逃避依恋互相吸引。
content.lesson_zh: 治愈依恋不是改变对方，而是改变自己。
content.healing_path_zh: 学习稳定自己的情绪系统。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh:
依恋是灵魂想回家的方式。


《S2 Mirror Path · Training File（21–50）》

content.karmic_loop_zh: 吸收他人情绪 → 失去中心 → 关系混乱。
content.lesson_zh: 练习分辨“这是我的”还是“这是对方的”。
content.healing_path_zh: 情绪界限与能量中心练习。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 共鸣不是合并，理解不是承担。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 情绪共鸣镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 情绪界限与能量中心练习。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对关系有高度期待，导致频繁失望。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 期待越高 → 失望越深 → 更高期待。
content.lesson_zh: 放下对对方的角色期待。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 期望越少，爱越真实。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 期待镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 回到“当下的真实连接”。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 总是由一方付出较多。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 无条件付出 → 被忽略 → 受伤 → 更付出。
content.lesson_zh: 停止用付出来换取价值。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 真正的爱不需要证明。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 付出镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 回到平衡的能量交换。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 一方压抑，一方爆发。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 压抑 → 忍耐 → 爆发 → 内疚。
content.lesson_zh: 情绪需要被看见，而不是被压住。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 压抑是你对自己的冷漠。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 情绪压抑镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 温柔表达真实需求。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你觉得被对方需要才有价值。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 牺牲自己 → 获得短暂价值感 → 耗尽。

content.healing_path_zh: 断开“被需要等于被爱”的幻象。

content.lesson_zh: 你的情绪不需要他人批准。

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 害怕深入亲密，却害怕失去。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 渴望靠近 → 一靠近就退缩。
content.lesson_zh: 觉察与亲密相关的恐惧。
content.healing_path_zh: 慢慢练习敞开，而不是强迫。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 真正的亲密不需要你完美。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 逃避亲密镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 慢慢练习敞开，而不是强迫。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对关系和对方要求过高。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 不够好 → 失望 → 批判 → 修复 → 再失望。
content.lesson_zh: 完美是幻象，真实才是力量。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 没有完美的爱，只有真实的爱。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 完美主义镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 放下对关系的理想化。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你不说需求，却期待对方懂你。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 不说 → 不被满足 → 生气 → 更不说。
content.lesson_zh: 需求被说出来才会被理解。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你值得被听见。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 隐藏需求镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 学习清晰表达。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 爱被等同于贡献或价值。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 付出换爱 → 得不到 → 更加付出。
content.lesson_zh: 爱不是交换。
content.healing_path_zh: 练习无条件的自我接纳。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你不是贡献，你是存在。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 价值交换镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 练习无条件的自我接纳。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 情绪互相拉扯，一高一低。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 情绪化 → 冷静 → 情绪化 → 循环。
content.lesson_zh: 情绪不是真相，只是反应。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 稳定来自内在，而非外在。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 情绪失衡镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 建立情绪观察者位置。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方的成就感让你焦虑。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 自卑 → 逃避 → 再自卑。
content.lesson_zh: 别人的成功不是你的失败。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 成功不是比较，是方向。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 失败恐惧镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 建立自我认可系统。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你总想确认对方是否满意。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 取悦 → 短暂和谐 → 内心空虚。
content.lesson_zh: 讨好来自害怕被拒绝。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 爱你的人不需要你完美。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 依赖认可镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 不讨好，不迎合，只真实。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方不断挑战你固有模式。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 被挑战 → 抵抗 → 再被挑战。
content.lesson_zh: 每一次挑战都是成长邀请。
content.healing_path_zh: 放下防御，采用开放心态。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你的不舒服，是你的突破点。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 挑战镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 放下防御，采用开放心态。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 关系让你质疑自我方向。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 怀疑 → 否定 → 放弃 → 再怀疑。
content.lesson_zh: 意义来自内心，而非他人。
content.healing_path_zh: 重新定义你的存在价值。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你的意义本来就不依附任何人。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 意义感镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 重新定义你的存在价值。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 即使在关系中，你也感到孤独。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 寻求靠近 → 依然孤独 → 更渴望靠近。
content.lesson_zh: 孤独是灵魂呼唤你回归自身。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 孤独不是缺失，而是门。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 孤独镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 与自己建立亲密关系。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你将对方放在神坛。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 崇拜 → 失望 → 贬低 → 再崇拜。
content.lesson_zh: 看见真实，而不是幻想。
content.healing_path_zh: 允许对方是人，不是理想。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 理想化是你拒绝看见真实。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 理想化镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 允许对方是人，不是理想。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 过度顺从对方的情绪。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 顺从 → 不满 → 爆发 → 内疚 → 再顺从。
content.lesson_zh: 顺从不是温柔，是恐惧。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 温柔不是放弃自己。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 情绪投降镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 建立自主性。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你为了关系不断牺牲自己。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 牺牲 → 痛苦 → 被忽略 → 更牺牲。
content.lesson_zh: 停止把爱等于忍耐。
content.healing_path_zh: 照顾自己先于照顾关系。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 牺牲不是爱，是自我遗弃。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 牺牲镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 照顾自己先于照顾关系。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你害怕被拒绝，因此不断退缩。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 不表达 → 不被看见 → 更害怕。
content.lesson_zh: 拒绝不是否定你的人。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 拒绝不是伤害，而是界限。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 拒绝镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 练习表达真实需求。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 双方容易互相控诉或责怪。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 控诉 → 防御 → 再控诉。
content.lesson_zh: 控诉背后的痛需要被理解。
content.healing_path_zh: 放下指责，用关系修复关系。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 控诉是无力的声音。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 控诉镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 放下指责，用关系修复关系。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方让你不断感到内疚或负担。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 愧疚 → 补偿 → 疲惫 → 更愧疚。
content.lesson_zh: 愧疚不是爱，是滞留的恐惧。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你无需为任何人的情绪负责。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 愧疚镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 练习自我宽恕。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 你感受自己被忽略、被误解。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 不被在意 → 生气 → 冷漠 → 再受伤。
content.lesson_zh: 寻求注意力是旧伤的呼救。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你的情绪值得被陪伴。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 情绪忽略镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 学习自我看见。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 关系进度不一致，一方快一方慢。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 推 → 对方退 → 更推。
content.lesson_zh: 尊重节奏差异。
content.healing_path_zh: 从“需要结果”回到“需要真实”。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 关系不是同步，而是相遇。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 投入不对等镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 从“需要结果”回到“需要真实”。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 关系触发你的深度自我怀疑。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 怀疑 → 回避 → 更怀疑。
content.lesson_zh: 看见怀疑背后的恐惧不是你。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你怀疑的不是关系，是自己。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 自我怀疑镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 重建自我信任。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方的承诺议题触发你的不安。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 想要承诺 → 越要求对方越退缩。
content.lesson_zh: 承诺不能被要求，只能被选择。
content.healing_path_zh: 让承诺从自由选择中生长。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你值得被选择，而不是被说服。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 承诺镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 让承诺从自由选择中生长。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 害怕投入太深、太快。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 退缩 → 渴望 → 再退缩。
content.lesson_zh: 觉察投入恐惧是保护机制。
content.healing_path_zh: 慢慢打开，而非强迫前进。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 你不需要一次走到终点。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 投入恐惧镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 慢慢打开，而非强迫前进。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.name: Soul Mirror
content.reflection_question: What relationship pattern is being mirrored back to me?
content.relationship_dynamic_zh: 对方激活你灵魂最深的成长课题。
content.karmic_loop_zh: 亲密 → 触发 → 分离 → 更深连接。
content.lesson_zh: 灵魂伴侣不是完美，而是觉醒。
content.healing_path_zh: 在爱中承担自己的成长。
content.wisewave_guidance_zh: 他不是来给你答案，而是来点亮你的真相。
content.reflective_summary: This Soul Mirror reflects a relational pattern around: 灵魂伴侣镜像 It invites the user to observe how relationships may reveal unmet needs, projections, boundaries, or growth edges.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: 在爱中承担自己的成长。
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
